name: ecosnap
description: Environmental Issue Reporting Platform with AI Analysis

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && python -c "from app.main import app; import uvicorn; uvicorn.run(app, host='127.0.0.1', port=8000, reload=True)"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install

author: Your Name
